No JTA platform available (set 'hibernate.transaction.jta.platform' to enable JTA platform integration) Hibernate: alter table appointments drop foreign key FKmujeo4tymoo98cmf7uj3vsv76 Hibernate: alter table appointments drop foreign key FK8exap5wmg8kmb1g1rx3by21yt Hibernate: alter table doctor_schedules drop foreign key FKqptts4sun4tpv6elafrnrfeup Hibernate: alter table doctors drop foreign key FKej53dw52rhcorh64enh2h4jmq Hibernate: alter table doctors drop foreign key FKj9htr7qxv0tmftfjftwpyv41l Hibernate: alter table doctors drop foreign key FKgisys6qm9qflq8w4npdhxafne Hibernate: alter table invoices drop foreign key FKngg5bc8atao2b9jehl9l8tdsw Hibernate: alter table patients drop foreign key FKn8xphvlp05nd3ydg0p1rbdaom Hibernate: alter table prescriptions drop foreign key FKe2fpvlkkcgcd40k4ufyyju2al Hibernate: alter table prescriptions drop foreign key FK24chc88e4so7cd6melh11rv6 Hibernate: alter table prescriptions drop foreign key FKqydyol76jn1o37k1bdbkjgq74 Hibernate: alter table user_profiles drop foreign key FKjcad5nfve11khsnpwj1mv8frj Hibernate: drop table if exists appointments Hibernate: drop table if exists clinic Hibernate: drop table if exists doctor_schedules Hibernate: drop table if exists doctors Hibernate: drop table if exists invoices Hibernate: drop table if exists patients Hibernate: drop table if exists prescriptions Hibernate: drop table if exists user_profiles Hibernate: drop table if exists users Hibernate: create table appointments ( is_priority bit, appointment_date datetime(6) not null, doctor_id bigint not null, id bigint not null auto_increment, patient_id bigint not null, cancellation_reason varchar(255), chief_complaint TEXT, visit_notes TEXT, appointment_type enum ('EXAMINATION','FOLLOW_UP') not null, cancelled_by enum ('DOCTOR','PATIENT','RECEPTIONIST','SYSTEM'), status enum ('Arrived','Cancelled','Completed','Confirmed','In_consultation','Pending'), primary key (id) ) engine=InnoDB Hibernate: create table clinic ( id bigint not null auto_increment, address varchar(255), name varchar(255) not null, phone_number varchar(255), primary key (id) ) engine=InnoDB Hibernate: create table doctor_schedules ( doctor_id bigint, id bigint not null auto_increment, day_of_week varchar(255), end_time varchar(255), start_time varchar(255), primary key (id) ) engine=InnoDB Hibernate: create table doctors ( consultation_duration integer, assistant_id bigint, clinic_id bigint, id bigint not null, specialization varchar(255), specialty varchar(255), primary key (id) ) engine=InnoDB Hibernate: create table invoices ( amount float(53), appointment_id bigint, created_at datetime(6), id bigint not null auto_increment, payment_status varchar(255), primary key (id) ) engine=InnoDB Hibernate: create table patients ( id bigint not null, blood_type varchar(255), emergency_contact varchar(255), medical_history varchar(255), primary key (id) ) engine=InnoDB Hibernate: create table prescriptions ( appointment_id bigint, doctor_id bigint, id bigint not null auto_increment, issued_at datetime(6), patient_id bigint, diagnosis TEXT, medicines TEXT, primary key (id) ) engine=InnoDB Hibernate: create table user_profiles ( birth_date date, user_id bigint not null, address varchar(255), full_name varchar(255), gender varchar(255), phone_number varchar(255), primary key (user_id) ) engine=InnoDB Hibernate: create table users ( is_active bit, needs_password_reset bit, id bigint not null auto_increment, reset_code_expires_at datetime(6), email varchar(255) not null, name varchar(255) not null, password varchar(255) not null, phone_number varchar(255) not null, reset_code varchar(255), role enum ('ADMIN','DOCTOR','PATIENT','RECEPTIONIST'), primary key (id) ) engine=InnoDB Hibernate: alter table doctors add constraint UKn7r3lk3melvrvf8ljoa1dhtf7 unique (assistant_id) Hibernate: alter table invoices add constraint UKr1gsksmeq3yb5fipnxl93yqqv unique (appointment_id) Hibernate: alter table prescriptions add constraint UKr0yn695qg51gn0iskc8p0h2ii unique (appointment_id) Hibernate: alter table users add constraint UK6dotkott2kjsp8vw4d0m25fb7 unique (email) Hibernate: alter table appointments add constraint FKmujeo4tymoo98cmf7uj3vsv76 foreign key (doctor_id) references doctors (id) Hibernate: alter table appointments add constraint FK8exap5wmg8kmb1g1rx3by21yt foreign key (patient_id) references patients (id) Hibernate: alter table doctor_schedules add constraint FKqptts4sun4tpv6elafrnrfeup foreign key (doctor_id) references doctors (id) Hibernate: alter table doctors add constraint FKej53dw52rhcorh64enh2h4jmq foreign key (assistant_id) references users (id) Hibernate: alter table doctors add constraint FKj9htr7qxv0tmftfjftwpyv41l foreign key (clinic_id) references clinic (id) Hibernate: alter table doctors add constraint FKgisys6qm9qflq8w4npdhxafne foreign key (id) references users (id) Hibernate: alter table invoices add constraint FKngg5bc8atao2b9jehl9l8tdsw foreign key (appointment_id) references appointments (id) Hibernate: alter table patients add constraint FKn8xphvlp05nd3ydg0p1rbdaom foreign key (id) references users (id) Hibernate: alter table prescriptions add constraint FKe2fpvlkkcgcd40k4ufyyju2al foreign key (appointment_id) references appointments (id) Hibernate: alter table prescriptions add constraint FK24chc88e4so7cd6melh11rv6 foreign key (doctor_id) references doctors (id) Hibernate: alter table prescriptions add constraint FKqydyol76jn1o37k1bdbkjgq74 foreign key (patient_id) references patients (id) Hibernate: alter table user_profiles add constraint FKjcad5nfve11khsnpwj1mv8frj foreign key (user_id) references users (id) 2026-05-08T15:34:14.868+03:00 INFO 18108 --- [scms] [ main] o.s.d.j.r.query.QueryEnhancerFactories : Hibernate is in classpath; If applicable, HQL parser will be used. 2026-05-08T15:34:16.984+03:00 INFO 18108 --- [scms] [ main] eAuthenticationProviderManagerConfigurer : Global AuthenticationManager configured with AuthenticationProvider bean with name authenticationProvider 2026-05-08T15:34:16.985+03:00 WARN 18108 --- [scms] [ main] r$InitializeUserDetailsManagerConfigurer : Global AuthenticationManager configured with an AuthenticationProvider bean. UserDetailsService beans will not be used by Spring Security for automatically configuring username/password login. Consider removing the AuthenticationProvider bean. Alternatively, consider using the UserDetailsService in a manually instantiated DaoAuthenticationProvider.
